title: Michigan tests expanding free ‘pre-K for all’ to home child-care providers
summary_en: A new program tests no-cost pre-K in home child care settings. Up until now, students had to attend a school or child care center to qualify for the free option.
author: Isabel Lohman
title_cn: 密歇根州试点将免费“全民学前教育”服务拓展至家庭托育机构
